---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
![](my_avatar.PNG){.roundedimg width="80%"}

::: {.centered}
**Shanshan Zhu**  
M.Sc. Student in Psychology  
Nanjing Normal University  

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email](mailto:zhushanshan0717@gmail.com)
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/shanshan717)
:::

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i> Twitter](https://x.com/shansha18840596)
[<i class="bi bi-cloud-fill"></i> Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/zhushanshan0717.bsky.social)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-8}
## About me

I’m Shanshan Zhu, currently a Master’s student in Psychology, with a research focus on the self and memory using functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI). I am currently pursuing my master’s degree at Nanjing Normal University. 

Outside of research, I enjoy running, photography, and DIY crafts. Welcome to explore my website and learn more about me. 

If you think we might have shared research interests, or if you are looking for a collaborator in related areas, please feel free to reach out. I would be glad to connect and exchange ideas.

:::

:::
